  • Classes in de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing.configuration used by de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.factory
    Class
    Description
    PathfinderConfiguration
    Defines a set of configurable parameters that govern the behavior of the A* pathfinding algorithm.
